creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
On Sat, 25 May 2013 15:45:38 GMT
thierry@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [PATCH] games/monsterz Version 0.7.1_4 install in wrong Directories
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: thierry
> State-Changed-When: sam 25 mai 2013 15:44:24 UTC
> State-Changed-Why: 
> 
> Hello,
> 
> Why do you think that it is installed in "wrong directories"?
> 
> Regards,
> 
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=170343

Hello

pkg info -l monsterz-0.7.1_4
monsterz-0.7.1_4 owns the following files:
/usr/local/bin/monsterz
/usr/local/games/monsterz                     <-- this Directory is wrong
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/graphics/background.png
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/graphics/bigtiles.png
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/graphics/board.png
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/graphics/icon.png
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/graphics/logo.png
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/graphics/tiles.png
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/monsterz.py
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/monsterz.pyc
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/monsterz.pyo
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/applause.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/boing.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/click.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/ding.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/duh.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/grunt.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/laugh.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/music.s3m
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/pop.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/warning.wav
/usr/local/share/games/monsterz/sound/whip.wav
/usr/local/share/licenses/monsterz-0.7.1_4/LICENSE
/usr/local/share/licenses/monsterz-0.7.1_4/WTFPL
/usr/local/share/licenses/monsterz-0.7.1_4/catalog.mk


Normal is used this Directory

${DATADIR} --> ${PREFIX}/share/monsterz

but You use, ok this works too but is for only some older Games,
and is used in GNU/Linux

${PREFIX}/share/games/monsterz

This must be according too

files/patch-Makefile


I think that should be too used

RUN_DEPENDS=    ${PYGAME}

PORTDOCS=       AUTHORS README TODO
not need for COPYING INSTALL

new OptionsNG

A Desktop entry

DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Monsterz" "${COMMENT}" "${PORTNAME}" \
                "${PORTNAME}" "Game;ArcadeGame;" false

A icon for Desktop entry

        ${LN} -sf ${DATADIR}/graphics/icon.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png

Regards,
nemysis
